name: ubuntu-claude-code
title: Ubuntu + XFCE/RDP + Claude Code (base)
description: The single base runner. Ubuntu desktop (XFCE/xrdp/x11vnc) + Node + Claude Code CLI: a complete, dispatch-free agent — RDP in and run `claude` manually. All optional capabilities (SideButton MCP server, Chrome, the SideButton extension, knowledge packs, MCP plugins, and toolchains like .NET 9 / Docker / psql) are layered on as COMPONENTS via AGENT_COMPONENTS. See ../../components.json and ../../docs/COMPONENTS.md. Ships no hooks — component behaviour (extension pre/post-services, toolchains) is driven by base/run.sh from the resolved component set.
